question: Across years 2015-16 through 2018-19, which Texas counties are consistently in the top five for total lunch serves in the Seamless Summer Option program? Among those counties, identify the two with the largest percentage decreases in day care home meal reimbursements from 2018-19 to 2020-21. For those two counties, compute the average child center enrollment across 2018-19 and 2019-20 and report the smaller average enrollment value. Return the number only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
